item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
• Smoother, gentler sound — the automatic leveling, compression, preamp warmth and brightness introduced in 1.1.2 have been re-tuned to be noticeably easier on the ears: audio lands with comfortable headroom under the loudness target, and tone shaping uses softer roll-offs. If 1.1.2 felt too hot or dense, this is the fix.
  • Crash reporting fixed — when more than one ⚡️EQ product had crash reports on your Mac, the report email could silently drop one product's reports. Every crashing product now always makes it into the email, and the email lists exactly what's attached.

item.title: Version 1.1.2
item.description:
• Auto-Fix button — one click scans for problems (noise, hum, clicks, clipping), applies every suggested repair, and shapes all controls from the analysis.
  • Before / After — hold the new capsule next to Play to hear the original; release for the processed sound. Looping is now gapless and keeps running while you hold it.
  • Smarter automatic sound, tuned on real recordings — loudness is calibrated to your specific clip and quiet recordings are gain-staged, so DJI/GoPro/phone tracks land at the preset's target. A second de-essing stage tames harsh wireless-mic esses.
  • Mic & Setup picks retuned — Action/Wireless and Phone picks get the full leveling budget, denser compression and real preamp drive.
  • Watch Folder catch-up — optionally process files already waiting in the folder when watching starts (dropped in while the app was closed), skipping already-processed ones.
  • Import Preset… and per-preset Share (AirDrop, Messages, Mail).
  • A/B dots survive relaunches and ride sessions; sessions remember loop and selection; the Auto-shape switch gives feedback; "already activated" instead of "invalid" when re-entering your license key.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
• Watch Folder remembers its folders, format and preset across launches — and resumes automatically if the app quit while watching.
  • True background operation: watching keeps running at full speed while the app is hidden, minimised or behind other apps.
  • Live progress in the header: a "Processing 2 of 5" badge with a per-file progress bar and percentage.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
• New repair tools: De-Click, De-Clip and De-Hum — Audio Health now fixes clicks, clipped peaks and electrical hum with one click.
  • Fixed: Isolate Voice, Remove Ambience and the De-Reverb tail-ducker previously had little to no effect — all three now work as intended.
  • MP3 export (256 kbps) for single files, Batch Match and the new Watch Folder.
  • Delivery check after every export: integrated LUFS, true peak and loudness range with pass/fail chips for YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Spotify and EBU R128. Batch writes a loudness report CSV; 16-bit exports are dithered.
  • Watch Folder: drop files in, processed files come out — with a chosen preset or your current settings.
  • Sessions: Cmd-S saves the timeline; auto-save on quit with restore on launch.
  • Analysis chips after import, live leveler/limiter readout, tooltips everywhere, per-slider A/B dots, keyboard shortcuts, a Setup tab, and presets that travel to and from the PowerEQ plugin.

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
• New spectral De-Reverb — removes room reverb under and between speech, as an Off/Low/Medium/High control.
  • Redesigned controls with Shape / Advanced tabs; opens showing the whole workflow.
  • Undo / Redo for every control (Cmd-Z / Shift-Cmd-Z).
  • The waveform now shows the original as a faint ghost behind the processed audio, so your changes are visible.
  • Importing a new file starts fresh instantly (fixes a lock-up when replacing audio).
  • Built-in, consent-first crash reporting.

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
• Fixes a crash when switching AI Cleanup off (or pressing Stop) during playback.
  • Batch Match: input files with identical names no longer overwrite each other's output.
  • "Check for Updates…" menu item now enables correctly after launch.
  • Cancelled batch runs keep their partial progress instead of showing as completed.

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description: • Licensing: only the paid Payhip variant unlocks the full app. Free-variant keys are recognized as free and stay on the 7-day trial. Existing paid licenses continue to work.

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description: • Preset loudness targets now match industry standards: YouTube -14 LUFS, Radio DJ -12 LUFS, Studio -14 LUFS, Bro -13 LUFS. Podcast stays at the Apple Podcasts standard of -16 LUFS.
